name: ERSST-v6-gridded
citation: Huang, B. et al. (2024). Improvements of the Daily Optimum Interpolation Sea Surface Temperature (DOISST) Version 2.1. Journal of Climate.
data_citation: NOAA Physical Sciences Laboratory. NOAA Extended Reconstructed SST V6 gridded monthly SST. https://psl.noaa.gov/thredds/catalog/Datasets/noaa.ersst.v6/catalog.html.
acknowledgement: NOAA Extended Reconstructed SST V6 data were provided by the NOAA PSL, Boulder, Colorado, USA, from their website at https://psl.noaa.gov.
notes: Separate gridded SST metadata for optional spatial processing. This collection must not be selected by the strict six-output global SST reference workflow.

datasets.long_name: NOAA Extended Reconstructed SST v6 monthly gridded sea-surface temperature
